candidate_llm_application: LLM positional encoding as neume-style relative contour vs exact-position embedding: relative-position encoding mirrors neume contour-only; absolute mirrors staff notation.

results.title: Positional Encoding Scheme Comparison: Survey
results.snippet: This 2025-2026 paper presents work on positional encoding scheme comparison, covering LLM-side mechanisms that achieve similar functional outcomes via alternative terminology.
results.judge_justification: Both candidate and result operate on the same LLM artefact (positional encoding scheme comparison); functional outcome matches even though vocabulary differs (musicology terms vs LLM terms).
